text: Standing here, I am struck by the cool precision and openness of the space—glass walls offering a transparent invitation into a realm seemingly dedicated to innovation and ideas. Entering further, the bold colors and large "R+D" on the wall suggest a celebration of research and development. Screens flicker with information, merging technology and curiosity. Amidst these visual cues, I feel a tinge of excitement and curiosity—this is a place shaped for discovery and for questioning, perhaps even for breakthroughs. I feel like I am on the threshold of possibility, eager yet contemplative about the knowledge waiting to be discovered here.
